notes: Fixed phrase using 'treiben' with 'Sport'. The noun 'Sport' is the accusative object. Commonly used in everyday German to express engaging in physical activity.

sentences.german: Ich treibe dreimal pro Woche Sport.
sentences.english: I do sports three times a week.

sentences.german: Sie hat ihr ganzes Leben lang regelmäßig Sport getrieben.
sentences.english: She did sports regularly her whole life.
